What you can do in NotebookLM

Studio outputs

Generate an Audio Overview to hear a conversation about your sources, or a Video Overview for a narrated visual walkthrough. You can also create a Mind Map to explore connections, a Report (including briefing docs and study guides), a Quiz and Flashcards for studying, an Infographic, a Slide Deck, and a Data Table.

Source types

Add a PDF, a Google Doc, Google Slides, a Google Spreadsheet, a web page, a YouTube video, Markdown, a DOCX file, a CSV, an EPUB, an image, pasted text, or audio and video from Google Drive.

Chat

Ask questions in the default chat, or switch to a learning guide, concise, or detailed response style. Tune the chat goal and response length.

Sharing

Share a notebook with viewers or editors, make it public, or restrict it to specific people.
